symptoms.symptom_name: Persistent firm cervical/supraclavicular lymph node for 3 months
symptoms.character: firm, normally non-tender, above the right collarbone

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Persistent (>2-4 week) firm lymphadenopathy is a core alarm feature for lymphoma.
Acute infective adenitis is short-lived and tender, not a 3-month firm node.

symptoms.symptom_name: Cyclical fevers and drenching night sweats over months
symptoms.character: fevers that come and go in waves; sweats soaking the bedsheets

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: B symptoms (fever, drenching night sweats) are cytokine-driven and prognostically defining in lymphoma.

symptoms.symptom_name: Unintentional weight loss (~12% of body weight)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Unintentional weight loss >10% is a B symptom marking systemic disease burden.

symptoms.symptom_name: Alcohol-induced pain localised to the involved node
symptoms.character: sharp pain in the node within minutes of a sip of alcohol

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Alcohol-induced nodal pain is rare but highly specific for Hodgkin lymphoma.

symptoms.character: constant whole-body itch, no rash, excoriated skin

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Paraneoplastic pruritus is a recognised association of lymphoma.
Fatigue is common and non-specific but consistent with systemic malignancy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute fever with rigors (self-reported 38.9C) and toxic appearance

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute rigors with toxic appearance cannot exclude sepsis remotely and drives the same-day in-person escalation.
Cytokine-driven fever flare is consistent with an acute exacerbation of B symptoms.

symptoms.symptom_name: Firm, rubbery, fixed node with contiguous supraclavicular spread on palpation

investigation_details.expected_result: 5 cm firm rubbery fixed right cervical node with orderly contiguous spread to the supraclavicular fossa; exquisitely tender after alcohol
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Fixation, size and supraclavicular spread cannot be established over chat and must be confirmed in person.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Firm rubbery fixed supraclavicular nodal disease with contiguous spread is characteristic — but is a sealed clinician finding, not telehealth-available.

symptoms.symptom_name: Excisional lymph node biopsy showing Reed-Sternberg cells

investigation_details.investigation_name: Excisional lymph node biopsy with histopathology
investigation_details.expected_result: Reed-Sternberg cells on histology, confirming classical Hodgkin lymphoma
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Without tissue histology the diagnosis cannot be confirmed; this is the definitive test and is never available in telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reed-Sternberg cells on excisional biopsy are diagnostic of Hodgkin lymphoma.
Airway compromise from nodal/mediastinal mass expansion is the highest-consequence deterioration; currently absent, but its emergence mandates a 000 escalation.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Cyclical fevers, drenching night sweats and >10% weight loss together define the B-symptom burden that marks systemic lymphoma and mandates urgent workup.
Persistent rubbery node + alcohol-induced nodal pain + paraneoplastic pruritus is a near-textbook Hodgkin constellation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive tissue diagnosis; arranged via urgent haematology fast-track — not performable in telehealth.
Stages disease extent once malignancy is suspected/confirmed; a specialist-arranged imaging study the AI cannot obtain.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Full blood count, blood film, LDH, ESR/CRP
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Baseline haematology and inflammatory markers; require venous bloods the AI cannot draw.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person clinical assessment of the acute febrile flare (including vital signs and sepsis screen)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The acute toxic febrile presentation needs same-day face-to-face assessment the AI cannot perform.
